summary: Added shared Shot type, AgentEnvelope, brand-merge precedence resolver, record-policy resolver, cost/balance helpers, and shotlist IO in novel_common.go; extracted submitAndAwait from run.go and added run --record.
reason: All novel commands operate on one canonical Shot schema and emit a uniform envelope; submitAndAwait gives a no-prints structured generation chain reusable across commands.
validated_outcome: submitAndAwait_test proves structured-data/no-prints/failed-prediction-not-error; brand precedence and record-policy unit tests pass.
